ingress_prefix_off_reason: raw.go Do/Client are prefix-free by design (TPRD §5.1 behavior matrix row 'caller owns raw args')

tprd_discrepancies_noted.reality: P0 errors.go does NOT pre-declare ErrCircuitOpen; P1 introduces it fresh
tprd_discrepancies_noted.impact: none (adding new sentinel is non-breaking); semver still minor

tprd_discrepancies_noted.claim: codec.JSON from motadatagosdk/core/codec used for JSON marshal
tprd_discrepancies_noted.reality: motadatagosdk/core/codec is a variable-width binary packer, not JSON; no codec.JSON symbol exists
tprd_discrepancies_noted.impact: P1 uses stdlib encoding/json directly (TPRD §9 'uses encoding/json under the hood' honored in spirit); dependency count unchanged

tprd_discrepancies_noted.source: TPRD §4 dependencies line 'motadatagosdk dependencies: core/codec (existing), core/circuitbreaker (existing)'
tprd_discrepancies_noted.reality: only core/circuitbreaker is actually used; core/codec reference is incorrect (see above)
tprd_discrepancies_noted.impact: one less internal dep than TPRD claims; noted in dep-vetting.md
